summary: UI-only Nuos wellness app tested successfully. All 8 sections render correctly with proper styling, fonts, and interactions. No backend APIs (UI-only app). All interactive elements are tappable and functional.
test_report_links: Playwright UI test executed via browser automation
action_items: Consider splitting index.tsx (813 lines) into smaller component files for better maintainability
Optional: Update expo-linear-gradient from 55.0.13 to ~15.0.8 and react-native-svg from 15.15.4 to 15.12.1 to match Expo 54 compatibility (currently working but shows warnings)
Optional: Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow for React Native 0.81+ compatibility (low priority, not affecting functionality)
critical_code_review_comments: All testID attributes present for testing ✓
Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity) ✓
Fonts load correctly (Poppins for headings, Inter for body) ✓
All text wrapped in Text components ✓
File size: 813 lines - acceptable for UI-only single screen but could be modularized
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is hardcoded placeholder content
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a UI-only Expo/React Native wellness app with no backend. All 8 sections tested and working: Header, Calendar pill, Recovery Index scorecard with circular progress (78/100), Auto Recoveries Today (3 cards), How We Know You (3 metrics), Today's Recovery Plan (3 plan items with action buttons), Vent with Nuo CTA, and Bottom tab bar (5 tabs with floating FAB). All buttons are tappable, scrolling works, fonts load correctly. Minor warnings about package versions and deprecated shadow props but no functional issues.
